9.monthly pravesh is used. Where for 12 months, date on
which sun enters into next sign is noted and accordingly
predictions are given. the sum of all 12 months is yearly
predictions. Prediction based on the monthly pravesh chart.
Predictions for next 2 months! – (posted on June 4, 2003)
Wednesday, 04 June , 2003, 00:00
The lunar month of Jyestha commenced on 31st May 2003 at 9.50 am, and here are
the indications of events that would happen in the coming months…
Technical aspect
In the horoscope, the 2nd lord is in the 11th house and 11th lord is in 10th house. Also
from Chandra lagna the 2nd lord is in the 12th house and 11th lord is in 3rd house.
Predictions
*There will be continued hammering of the stocks, followed by erosion of value stocks.
They will touch new peaks and then they will crash.
*There won’t be any major accidents.
